title: polystichum lonchitis
intro: Polystichum lonchitis, also known as the Deer Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Polystichum lonchitis include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Deer Fern can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in poultices and salves to apply topically.
